div.p: Raw source → structured token stream across 4 milestones

g.text: Orange border | M3 Strings and Comments
OPERATORS | PLUS, MINUS, STAR, SLASH, ASSIGN
Deliverable | ERROR token for unknown chars
Deliverable | Keyword lookup: if else while return
Key Rule | Always prefer longest valid token
Error cases | unterminated string, block comment
Key Rule | // inside string is NOT a comment
Output | STRING, SLASH, or no token (comments)
Deliverable | Canonical token stream assertion tests
Deliverable | Error recovery: collect all errors
Deliverable | Edge cases: empty, long, Windows CRLF
Strategy | Emit ERROR token, continue scanning
Contract | scan_tokens() always ends with EOF
Input | Complete programs with mixed errors
